name_cn:
Top-tier ✨【Alma BB Handbag】M53152 Multicolore
M13078 Multicolore
As a tribute to the City of Light, Paris, the Monogram Multicolore series presents this Alma BB handbag. Monogram Multicolore canvas shapes an Art Deco silhouette, the Louis Vuitton Paris logo appears like a Paris street sign, and the central stripes reiterate classic brand elements.
Size: 23.5 x 17.5 x 11.5 cm.
